---
title: "DACSS 690V HW2"
output: 
  flexdashboard::flex_dashboard:
    orientation: columns
    vertical_layout: fill
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(flexdashboard)
library(ggplot2)
```

Column {data-width=650}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Three-Gear Cars are Dominant

```{r}
plot1 = "https://github.com/DACSS-690V-1000/DACSS_690V-HWs/raw/main/p1.rds"
readRDS(url(plot1))
```

Column {data-width=350}
-----------------------------------------------------------------------

### Few Cars have Six or more Carburators

```{r}
plot2 = "https://github.com/DACSS-690V-1000/DACSS_690V-HWs/raw/main/p2.rds"
readRDS(url(plot2))
```

### Only 5 gear cars utilize the 6 and 8 carburators setups

```{r}
plot3= "https://github.com/DACSS-690V-1000/DACSS_690V-HWs/raw/main/p3.rds"
readRDS(url(plot3))
```
